original_prompt: change our taskgrid page to exactly this design: <!DOCTYPE html>...

clarification_questions.question: Should be based on: Task creation order in the database? Task position in the current grid view? Or something else?
How should these be determined? Randomly assigned? Based on task status/properties? User-selectable?
clarification_questions.answer: based on the task type you will determine based on chat/prompt/instructions, for each type we will have a dedicated icon

clarification_questions.question: Should I keep current features (edit, delete, toggle status, progress bar) or simplify it to match the design exactly?
Should I: Keep existing tasks in your database? Replace them with the sample tasks from the design? Generate placeholder tasks?
clarification_questions.answer: generate content for 50 tasks which will serve as demo content and can be removed by the user if he needs to, add a small button in the bottom right with: delete demo data
